Dear Mr. Smith,

We are pleased to inform you that your application for the credit facility has been approved. The terms and conditions of the facility are outlined in the attached schedule.

Please review the enclosed documents carefully and return the signed copies to our office at your earliest convenience.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Sincerely,

Jane Doe
